# This file intentionally lists vulnerable packages for testing purposes.
# DO NOT use these versions in production.

# Known vulnerable: CVE-2019-11324 (urllib3 < 1.24.2 - CRLF injection)
urllib3==1.24.1

# Known vulnerable: CVE-2021-33503 (urllib3 < 1.26.5)
requests==2.25.0

# A safe modern version included to verify it produces no false positives.
certifi==2023.7.22
